items.name: bento-grid
items.title: Bento Grid
items.description: Responsive bento-style feature grid with hover-reveal CTAs.

items.name: pricing-card
items.title: Pricing Card
items.description: Composable pricing card with glass header, plan badges, price slots.

items.name: feature-card
items.title: Feature Card
items.description: Feature card with corner bracket decorators, header, body, and dual-mode imagery.

items.name: animate-in
items.title: AnimateIn
items.description: Entrance animation primitive with emerge / flow / fade presets, lazy-loaded framer-motion.

items.name: magic-card
items.title: Magic Card
items.description: Spotlight cursor-tracking card with gradient border highlight.

items.name: globe
items.title: Globe (WebGL)
items.description: Interactive WebGL globe powered by cobe — heavy peer dependency.

items.name: chart
items.title: Chart
items.description: Recharts wrapper with theme-aware color tokens and tooltip primitives.

items.name: command-menu
items.title: Command Menu
items.description: AI command palette built on cmdk + base-ui dialog.

items.name: kpi-card
items.title: KPI Card
items.description: Dashboard KPI card with trend chevrons and lucide iconography.

items.name: metric-card
items.title: Metric Card
items.description: Linear / Vercel / Supabase inspired SaaS dashboard metric tile.

items.name: text-shimmer
items.title: Text Shimmer
items.description: Animated text shimmer used as the streaming-header substrate for the chat tool-family.

items.name: loading-dots
items.title: Loading Dots
items.description: Three-dot bouncing loader; reused inside EditTool's approval footer.

items.name: edit-tool
items.title: Edit Tool
items.description: Inline AI tool-call rendering for file edits — Cursor / Claude Code-style diff block with optional approval footer.

items.name: question-tool
items.title: Question Tool
items.description: Inline AI tool-call rendering of a multi-step questionnaire — single / multi / text question kinds.

items.name: mcp-tool
items.title: MCP Tool
items.description: Inline AI tool-call rendering for MCP invocations — verb conjugation, priority-sorted args, expandable output panel.

items.name: todo-tool
items.title: Todo Tool
items.description: Flat streaming todo list for the Claude TodoWrite tool — sibling of EditTool / McpTool / SearchTool.

items.name: search-tool
items.title: Search Tool
items.description: Inline AI tool-call rendering for search/retrieval results — honest-link rows, scrollable result panel.

items.name: subagent-tool
items.title: Subagent Tool
items.description: Single-line status pill for delegated subagent invocations — lightest member of the chat tool-family.

items.name: file-attachment
items.title: File Attachment
items.description: Chip / thumbnail display for an attached file in a chat composer or message bubble. Keyboard-accessible removal.

items.name: expandable-gallery
items.title: Expandable Gallery
items.description: Fanned photo stack that animates into a responsive grid. Tab/Enter expands; outside-click or Back collapses.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Base UI Tooltip wrapper for concise, non-interactive explanatory text.

items.name: context-card
items.title: Context Card
items.description: Geist-style hover/focus card built on Base UI Popover for compact entity metadata.

items.name: relative-time-card
items.title: Relative Time Card
items.description: Short relative-time label with hover popover showing absolute UTC + local time. Adaptive tick cadence.

items.name: project-banner
items.title: Project Banner
items.description: Full-width, non-dismissible banner for project-wide states needing resolution. Four severity variants + ARIA live region.

items.name: browser-mockup
items.title: Browser
items.description: Geist-style browser chrome around a screenshot or demo. Middle-truncating address bar, aspect-locked image viewport.

items.name: choicebox
items.title: Choicebox
items.description: Card-style selection control with radio (single) and checkbox (multi) modes. Roving tabindex + arrow-key navigation.

items.name: code-block
items.title: Code Block
items.description: Syntax-highlighted code viewer with copy + diff lines. Accepts Geist single-file children API or Nebutra multi-file tabs.

items.name: collapse
items.title: Collapse
items.description: Geist-style flat Collapse/CollapseGroup API on top of our Accordion. Single, multiple-open, and standalone modes.

items.name: description
items.title: Description
items.description: Definition-list metadata block (<dl>/<dt>/<dd>). Title Case key + emphasized value, optional tooltip on the label.

items.name: entity
items.title: Entity
items.description: Row of descriptive content paired with one or two controls. Compound Entity / Entity.Content / Entity.List.

items.name: nebutra-tokens
items.title: Nebutra Tokens
items.description: Drops the Nebutra design-system CSS variables (brand, neutral, status, container scale) into globals.css. No TSX.
